note: Reference for configuring the Railway template. 'source' indicates how the value is supplied.

sources.auto: Railway injects this automatically — do not set manually
sources.generated: Railway generates a random secret at deploy time — user never touches it
sources.shared: Set once at project level, referenced by both web and worker services
sources.plugin: Auto-provided by the Railway Postgres or Redis plugin
sources.prefilled: Sensible default provided — user can override if needed
sources.required: User must supply this value — no default possible
sources.optional: Only needed for optional features — leave blank to skip

shared_variables.name: SECRET_KEY_BASE
shared_variables.description: Rails encryption key. Auto-generated — never share or change after deploy.

shared_variables.name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
shared_variables.description: AES-256 key for encrypting Planning Center OAuth tokens.

web.name: RESEND_API_KEY
web.description: API key from resend.com. Required for magic link login emails.

web.name: MAILER_FROM
web.description: Sender address for emails. Must be from a domain verified in Resend. Example: Kidspire <noreply@mail.yourdomain.com>

web.name: FRONTEND_BASE_URL
web.description: Public URL of the frontend. Example: https://yourapp.up.railway.app

web.name: VITE_API_BASE_URL
web.description: Public URL of the API. Example: https://yourapp.up.railway.app/api/v1

web.name: CORS_ORIGINS
web.description: Allowed frontend origin for CORS. Should match FRONTEND_BASE_URL.

web.name: PCO_CLIENT_SECRET
web.description: OAuth app client secret from Planning Center.

web.name: PCO_REDIRECT_URI
web.description: OAuth callback URL. Must match exactly what is registered in Planning Center. Example: https://yourapp.up.railway.app/auth/pco/callback

web.name: PCO_KIDS_MINISTRY_TAG
web.description: Tag name in PCO People used to identify kids ministry families.

web.name: CUSTOM_DOMAIN
web.description: Custom domain if you have one. Leave blank to use the Railway-provided URL.

web.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
web.description: Twilio account SID. Only required for SMS invite links.

web.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
web.description: Twilio auth token. Only required for SMS invite links.

web.name: TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER
web.description: Twilio phone number in E.164 format. Only required for SMS invite links.

worker.name: RESEND_API_KEY
worker.description: Same value as web service — reference from shared variables.

worker.name: MAILER_FROM
worker.description: Same value as web service — reference from shared variables.

worker.name: PCO_CLIENT_ID
worker.description: Same value as web service — reference from shared variables.

worker.name: PCO_CLIENT_SECRET
worker.description: Same value as web service — reference from shared variables.

worker.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
worker.description: Same value as web service — reference from shared variables.

worker.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
worker.description: Same value as web service — reference from shared variables.

worker.name: TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER
worker.description: Same value as web service — reference from shared variables.
